name: Coverage: Weekly recurring via assistant natural language
description: Event dialog has no Repeats control in current UI. Create a weekly recurring event via assistant NL if supported; otherwise assert dialog still supports one-off create. Backend expand is covered separately.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Open AI chat with Open AI chat or Control+K
Type Schedule TS Weekly Recur every Monday at 9am for 30 minutes starting next Monday and Send
Wait up to 8 seconds for an assistant response (create preview, confirmation, or clarification)
Verify the assistant responds with a create confirmation, recurrence-aware preview, free-slot suggestion, or a clear message about the weekly request — not a blank panel
If Create event is shown, click it and wait 4 seconds
If create was confirmed, verify success feedback or TS Weekly Recur appears on the calendar; if only clarification was shown, that is acceptable for this coverage pass
